creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->feedback

Dear submitter, 

I have recently changed the default SASL setting from 'enable' to 
'disable' which should have corrected the issue.  Would you please 
try the following and report back if this works for you? 

- cd /usr/ports/net/openldap23-client 
- make rmconfig 
- portupgrade -fr openldap* 

Thanks in advance!
